# Support

Where to get help with Desktop Frame.

## Questions and help

- Start with the documentation. The [documentation map](../Documentation/README.md) is the entry point, and [Development](../Documentation/Development) covers setup and common tasks.
- For how-to questions and general discussion, open a thread in GitHub Discussions.

## Reporting a bug

Open an issue using the Bug report template. Include your macOS version, hardware, build, and steps to reproduce. Bugs are handled per [BugManagement.md](../Documentation/Processes/BugManagement.md).

## Requesting a feature

Open an issue using the Feature request template, or raise it in Discussions first if you want to talk it through. Accepted requests become tracked features.

## Security issues

Do not use public issues for vulnerabilities. Follow [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).

## What this project does not support

Desktop Frame is macOS only. There is no Windows or Linux build, by design. Questions about other platforms are out of scope.

## Response expectations

This is a maintained project, not a paid support contract. Maintainers triage issues and discussions as capacity allows, prioritizing crashes, data loss, and security over everything else.
